testcase.name: test_signup_validation_empty_name

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected validation error, got 404 assert 404 in [400, 422] + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_comprehensive_qa_audit.py:89: in test_signup_validation_empty_name assert response.status_code in [400, 422], f"Expected validation error, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected validation error, got 404 E assert 404 in [400, 422] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected validation error, got 404 assert 404 in [400, 422] + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_comprehensive_qa_audit.py:99: in test_signup_validation_invalid_email assert response.status_code in [400, 422], f"Expected validation error, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected validation error, got 404 E assert 404 in [400, 422] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_story_scene_count_max

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 422 for sceneCount > 15, got 401 assert 401 == 422 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_comprehensive_qa_audit.py:303: in test_story_scene_count_max assert response.status_code == 422, f"Expected 422 for sceneCount > 15, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 422 for sceneCount > 15, got 401 E assert 401 == 422 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_comprehensive_qa_audit.py:322: in test_genstudio_dashboard assert response.status_code == 200 E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_thumbnail_text_generation

failure.message: assert 'thumbnails' in {'creditsUsed': 1, 'ideas': {'clickbait': ["You Won't Believe Morning Routine!", 'The Morning Routine Secret Nobody Tells You', 'I Tried Morning Routine and THIS Happened', 'Stop! Watch This Before Morning Routine', 'Why Morning Routine Changed Everything'], 'emotional': ['The Truth About Morning Routine', 'Why I Love Morning Routine', 'Morning Routine Will Make You Cry', 'The Morning Routine Journey', 'How Morning Routine Changed My Life'], 'informative': ['How to Master Morning Routine', 'Morning Routine: Complete Guide', 'Everything About Morning Routine', 'Morning Routine Tips & Tricks', 'Learn Morning Routine in 5 Minutes']}, 'topic': 'Morning Routine'}

testcase.name: test_7_day_challenge_generation
testcase.failure: tests/test_comprehensive_qa_audit.py:503: in test_7_day_challenge_generation assert response.status_code == 200, f"Challenge generation failed: {response.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: Challenge generation failed: {"detail":"Invalid token"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_cashfree_order_creation

failure.message: AssertionError: Unexpected status: 401 assert 401 in [200, 400] + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_comprehensive_qa_audit.py:658: in test_cashfree_order_creation assert response.status_code in [200, 400], f"Unexpected status: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Unexpected status: 401 E assert 401 in [200, 400] E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_cashfree_order_creation_no_product

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 400 for invalid product, got 401 assert 401 == 400 + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_comprehensive_qa_audit.py:675: in test_cashfree_order_creation_no_product assert response.status_code == 400, f"Expected 400 for invalid product, got {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 400 for invalid product, got 401 E assert 401 == 400 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
